result.stdout:
Description:
  Bicep registry module tool

Usage:
  Azure.Bicep.RegistryModuleTool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --verbose       Show verbose information

Commands:
  validate  Validate files for the Bicep registry module
  generate  Generate files for the Bicep registry module
